a with rightwards arrow on top equals open parentheses table row cell square root of 2 end cell row cell negative 1 end cell end table close parentheses space d a n space space b with rightwards arrow on top equals open parentheses table row 1 row 1 end table close parentheses
B e s a r space s u d u t space a n t a r a space space a with rightwards arrow on top space d a n space b with rightwards arrow on top space a d a l a h....
